prompt:
Full-body anime character editorial poster, split-panel layout, left half white grunge with black ink splatter, right half deep crimson red. Tall male figure with spiky orange hair, Rinnegan purple eyes, facial piercings, black Akatsuki cloak with red clouds, walking forward commanding. Left panel: bold header "PAIN / NAGATO", monospace classified codes, crosshair geometry, Korean hangul quote.
Right panel: vertical Japanese kanji God of Pain, VER. 6.0, Korean quote bottom-right. Faint "ABSOLUTE AUTHORITY" watermark center. Grunge ink bleeds across split. Techwear cyberpunk editorial, classified document aesthetic, mixed English/Japanese/Korean typography, flat high contrast.
